g.text: Customize typography to improve your reading experience. Selections persist across sessions.
Applied to all text. Preview each option in its own typeface.
Classic serif — comfortable for long reading
Weighted bottoms — easier for dyslexic readers
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Body paragraph. Changing the font updates every page in place — no reload,
no layout shift. Your selection is saved to local storage and survives
browser close, theme switches, and PWA reinstalls.
Fonts that fail to load fall back to a similar category — you stay unblocked.
Selection stored in localStorage, applied before first paint on next visit.
Print stylesheet uses print-friendly fonts regardless of the screen choice.
Tap an option to apply it everywhere.
Dropdown lists ≥6 fonts grouped by purpose. Selecting one
applies it globally with no page reload.
Current selection persists to localStorage and is reapplied
before first paint on the next visit.
Dyslexia-friendly and high-readability options are grouped
Each option renders its name in its own face; right-side
panel shows a live sample paragraph before commit.
Chosen font survives all 32 DaisyUI themes; contrast and
layout stay stable in every swatch.
Font fails to load → fallback category (serif/sans/mono) kicks in, user stays unblocked.
Printing → dedicated print stylesheet uses print-friendly face regardless of screen choice.
Limited-font devices → System UI option always present as a guaranteed-available fallback.
